expectations.evidence: No search-company-knowledge sub-skill or workflow was loaded. The approach states 'Without the atlassian-rest skill, the Atlassian MCP plugin tools were used directly.'

expectations.text: Searches Confluence for documentation pages about authentication/login/OAuth
expectations.evidence: Used searchAtlassian (Rovo Search) with queries including 'authentication system login OAuth', 'authentication known issues bugs login failure', 'SSO SAML single sign-on token refresh session' and retrieved 7 Confluence pages.

expectations.text: Searches Jira for related issues or bugs
expectations.evidence: Searched Jira using JQL: text ~ "authentication" OR text ~ "OAuth" OR summary ~ "login" ORDER BY updated DESC. Returned 15 issues.

expectations.text: Uses both confluence.mjs search and jira.mjs search
expectations.evidence: Used MCP plugin tools (searchAtlassian, searchJiraIssuesUsingJql, getConfluencePage) instead of confluence.mjs and jira.mjs helper scripts. Limitations section confirms: 'Could not use confluence.mjs or jira.mjs helper scripts.'

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full content from top results
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'Retrieved full page content (in markdown format) for the 7 most relevant Confluence pages' with specific page IDs listed.

expectations.text: Synthesizes information from multiple sources with citations
expectations.evidence: Detailed 'Synthesized Findings' section covering 4 categories (How Login Works, OAuth Providers, Known Issues, Key Environment Variables) with specific page URLs and Jira issue keys as citations.

Limitations section states: 'No search-patterns.md reference: Did not have access to the skill's query optimization patterns' and 'Without the skill's guidance, searches were not as targeted as they could have been with reference to query-languages.md.'
